issues.detail: Skill references .claude/... paths, which are vendor-specific and may not work with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Product schema for Shopify product page
scenarios.rationale: Treatment produces JSON-LD with @type: Product, all required properties (name, image, offers with price/priceCurrency/availability) and an AggregateRating with ratingValue 4.6 and reviewCount 238; baseline outputs flat non-spec properties (price, inStock, rating).

scenarios.name: FAQ schema for pricing page
scenarios.rationale: Treatment generates FAQPage with mainEntity as an array of Question items each with acceptedAnswer text, plus the schema-vs-visible-content mismatch warning; baseline uses an invented questions property and omits the content-match rule.
